title: Salt on the Window
prompt: Create a track blending electronic, ambient, and experimental sounds with ska and punk influences. Utilize soft female vocals over flowing melodies, integrating lush soundscapes and intricate arrangements. Aim for a bittersweet, reflective mood with a moderate tempo of around 128 BPM. Ensure the production is warm and textured while maintaining an intimate atmosphere. Avoid overly aggressive elements and heavy distortion.
style: Experimental electronic ambient pop with ska offbeat pulse and punk energy; moderate 128 BPM feel, flowing and syncopated. Verse stays close-mic and sparse over soft skank guitar and drifting pads; pre-chorus opens with layered harmonies and rising textures; chorus blooms into buoyant gang vocals and bright melodic lifts. Warm tape haze, reversed swells, glassy arps, and little percussion flickers between lines, mixed intimate, textured, and gently wide. Female vocals, ambient, ska, punk, electronic, soft, experimental, female vocals, warm
